creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
SDL 2.0 is the development branch of SDL.
There are no more planned changes to the SDL 1.2 branch.

I need to compile a program that specifically uses SDL 2.0, so here is a port.

I used devel/sdl12 as the initial template, but it doesn't conflict with devel/sdl12 or any of its related ports and uninstalls cleanly.

It does NOT satisfy programs that use SDL 1.2 branch.

Fix: Extract the attached shar to ports/devel/


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Try to compile a program that uses SDL 2.0
